message: Antacids reduce ciprofloxacin absorption significantly. Space doses 2 hours apart.
Clarithromycin inhibits simvastatin metabolism, raising risk of muscle toxicity (rhabdomyolysis).
Amoxicillin/clavulanate can reduce methotrexate clearance, raising toxicity risk.
May significantly increase bleeding risk. Consult doctor before using together
Increased bleeding risk. Avoid combination unless prescribed
May increase lactic acidosis risk. Avoid alcohol while taking medicine
May increase methotrexate toxicity. Monitor patient closely
May reduce aspirin effectiveness. Take only under medical advice
May increase liver damage risk. Avoid alcohol
Calcium reduces iron absorption. Take at least 2 hours apart
May reduce antibiotic absorption. Take antibiotic 2 hours before antacid
